News Capstone » Forms

Forms news_app.forms

Django forms for the news_app application. Provides the user registration form bound to the custom user model.

class CustomUserCreationForm(UserCreationForm)

User creation form bound to the CustomUser model with role selection. Ensures that registration creates instances of the custom user (with role and subscription fields) instead of the default auth.User. New users choose a role (Reader, Editor, or Journalist) during sign-up so they can immediately access role-appropriate features.

Fields

roleChoiceField — Backed by CustomUser.Roles.choices. Stays in sync with any future changes to the Roles enum.
usernameInherited from UserCreationForm.
emailInherited from UserCreationForm.
password1 / password2Inherited from UserCreationForm.

save(commit=True)

def save(self, commit: bool = True) → CustomUser

Create the user, set the role, and attach the correct permission group:

  1. Save the base user instance (username, email, password).
  2. Apply the selected role to the CustomUser instance.
  3. Add the user to the corresponding Django auth Group (Reader / Editor / Journalist).

Group membership grants the CRUD permissions on Article and Newsletter from the moment the account is created.

Parameters:commit (bool) — Whether to save to the database immediately. Defaults to True.
Returns:CustomUser — The newly created user instance.

_assign_group_for_role(user)

def _assign_group_for_role(self, user: CustomUser) → None

Internal helper to attach the user to the correct auth Group. Complements the post_migrate signal that creates the groups. Fails silently if the group does not exist (e.g. migrations not yet run).

Built with Sphinx 8.1.3 using the Read the Docs theme. News Capstone 1.0.0.
